description: Thin execution pointer to the ACTIVE OpenSpec change. This file does NOT define scope — openspec/changes/<active>/tasks.md is the authoritative task list. It only enforces the one-change-at-a-time invariant for the harness (init.sh rejects >1 in_progress).

features.summary: Reconcile contexia-app/ source so a rebuild reproduces the full client PWA WITH live Caja Real baked in; retire the hand-edited app/ script. Scope: openspec/changes/reconcile-contexia-app-source-live-pwa/tasks.md
